name: @intentsolutionsio/schedule-after-usage-reset
description: Automatically find the Claude usage reset time and schedule a deferred task to run right after the limit lifts.

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install schedule-after-usage-reset\\n  or /plugin install schedule-after-usage-reset@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
